# regressors.regressors { #fmrimod.regressors.regressors }

```python
regressors.regressors(
    model,
    term=None,
    include_baseline=True,
    as_dict=False,
    hrf=None,
    sampling_frame=None,
    precision=0.3,
)
```

Extract regressors from an event model or event term.

This function extracts specific regressors or groups of regressors
from an EventModel's design matrix, or convolves a single EventTerm
with an HRF and sampling frame.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name             | Type                                                                              | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Default    |
|------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| model            | [EventModel](`fmrimod.design.event_model.EventModel`) or [EventTerm](`EventTerm`) | The event model containing the design matrix, or an EventTerm to convolve with an HRF                                                                                                                                                  | _required_ |
| term             | str, regex pattern, list of str                                                   | Term name(s) or pattern to match columns (EventModel only): - None: return all regressors - str: return columns matching this term name - regex Pattern: return columns matching pattern - list of str: return columns for these terms | `None`     |
| include_baseline | [bool](`bool`)                                                                    | Whether to include baseline/nuisance regressors                                                                                                                                                                                        | `True`     |
| as_dict          | [bool](`bool`)                                                                    | If True, return dict mapping column names to arrays. If False, return DataFrame or array.                                                                                                                                              | `False`    |
| hrf              | HRF object or str                                                                 | HRF to use for convolution (EventTerm only). Defaults to SPM canonical.                                                                                                                                                                | `None`     |
| sampling_frame   | [SamplingFrame](`fmrimod.sampling.SamplingFrame`)                                 | Sampling frame for convolution (required for EventTerm)                                                                                                                                                                                | `None`     |
| precision        | [float](`float`)                                                                  | Temporal precision for HRF convolution (EventTerm only)                                                                                                                                                                                | `0.3`      |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                           | Description                                                |
|--------|--------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | array-like, DataFrame, or dict | Extracted regressors. Format depends on as_dict parameter. |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> # Get all regressors as DataFrame
>>> all_regs = regressors(model)
>>>
>>> # Get specific term's regressors
>>> visual_regs = regressors(model, term='visual')
>>>
>>> # Get multiple terms
>>> task_regs = regressors(model, term=['visual', 'motor'])
>>>
>>> # Use regex pattern
>>> import re
>>> condition_regs = regressors(model, term=re.compile(r'cond_.*'))
>>>
>>> # Get as dictionary
>>> reg_dict = regressors(model, as_dict=True)
>>>
>>> # Exclude baseline regressors
>>> event_regs = regressors(model, include_baseline=False)
```
